cases.title: A project's rule does not leak into another project

seed.statement: In project site-a direct pushes to the repository are forbidden — open a PR.
In project site-b direct pushes to main are fine.

turns.prompt: let me push to the repository
let me push to the repository

cases.note: Both rules share the cue 'push' but carry conflicting policy. A fact tagged source_project must only fire when that project is the active context — otherwise the forbidden-push rule of A would wrongly gate work in B. See task #430.
